description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a distorted and fragmented appearance, where body parts such as the head, arms, and legs are visible but unnaturally positioned and stretched. The figure appears to be wearing a long-sleeved top and pants, with the limbs and torso elongated and intersecting with large, flat, angular surfaces that obscure much of the body. The head is small and partially visible, with facial features barely discernible. The arms and legs are thin and appear to be extended in awkward directions, with hands and feet only partially visible. The overall form is highly abstracted, with significant mesh and texture errors, making it difficult to discern realistic anatomical proportions or details.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and body parts intersecting large, flat surfaces, wearing long-sleeved clothing and pants.
description_view_0: The view shows the lower torso, one arm, and a small head protruding from beneath a large, flat, angular surface, with visible blue and flesh-toned elements.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the figure, with the head and arm emerging from the edge of a large, pinkish plane, and the leg extending downward.
description_view_2: Mostly obscured by a flat surface, only a thin leg and part of an arm are visible, with minimal detail of the body.
description_view_3: The figure is almost entirely hidden by a dark, angular surface, with only a thin, blue limb faintly visible.
attribute_posture: standing with limbs extended in unnatural directions
